name: StoreOrderCapacityPeriod
description: Represents a single order capacity period

MaxOrderNumberPerStoreInterval.description:
The maximum number of orders per each store order interval in this order capacity period.
E.g. for a period from 9:00 till 11:00, if the store's interval is 10 minutes, and MaxOrderNumberPerStoreInterval is set to 5,
it means that within each 10-minute interval between 9:00 and 11:00 (i.e. 9:00-9:10, 9:10-9:20, .. , 10:50-11:00) it will be possible to
request at most 5 orders.

DayOfTheWeek.description: Day of the week the period pertains to

PeriodStartHour.description: The hour the period starts at

PeriodStartMinutes.description: The minutes after the hour the period starts at

PeriodEndHour.description: The hour the period ends at

PeriodEndMinutes.description: The minutes after the hour the period ends at
